review_text: A little gem in a quiet neighborhood of Lugano. Well-kept, clean, and very quiet.

As of today, May 17, the entire soccer field and half of the basketball court are under maintenance.
We still had fun on the swings and slides, enjoying a picnic lunch comfortably at a wooden table with benches located in the shade of a tree.
The kids had a blast.
A great place for children and families. With various play options for all ages, picnic tables in the shade, and public restrooms on site.
Clean, with lots of toys for my granddaughter, she had so much fun!!
Lots of equipment, table and benches, soccer field
I used to go there as a kid... And it's changed for the better

Small park but very beautiful and well-kept, there is a swing for the little ones and a double slide, bouncy castle and more, only three stars because there is a fountain but it is always turned off, a shame.
It's too hot in summer, there are no trees
